title: RuntimeConfig
description: Full MEDRE runtime configuration document — the root YAML file operators write and pass to `medre run --config`. Models the STRUCTURE of the root config (root keys, section shapes, transport groups, route entries). Per-field constraints (adapter field validation, route policy shapes) are enforced by the typed config dataclasses at load time and by the component schemas (adapter-config.schema.json, routing-config.schema.json). The authoritative runtime validator is `medre config check`.

shutdown_drain_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for in-flight work to drain during graceful shutdown.

delivery_acquire_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for acquiring a delivery slot when the in-flight limit is reached.

level.description: MEDRE namespace logger level (e.g. DEBUG, INFO, WARNING). Case-insensitive at load time.

overrides.description: Per-logger namespace level overrides keyed by logger name (e.g. nio: WARNING).

path.description: Storage path. Null means the default {state}/medre.sqlite is used.

enabled.description: Whether the background retry worker is active.

interval_seconds.description: Polling interval in seconds for checking due retry receipts.

batch_size.description: Maximum retry receipts processed per polling cycle.

max_attempts.description: Maximum total delivery attempts before dead-lettering.

adapters.description: Adapter instances grouped by transport. Only the four known transport groups are accepted; unknown groups (e.g. a typo like 'matrixx') are rejected. Per-instance field validation is done by adapter-config.schema.json and the typed adapter config dataclasses at load time.

matrix.description: Matrix adapter instances: mapping of instance name to MatrixConfig table.

meshtastic.description: Meshtastic adapter instances: mapping of instance name to MeshtasticConfig table.

meshcore.description: MeshCore adapter instances: mapping of instance name to MeshCoreConfig table.

lxmf.description: LXMF adapter instances: mapping of instance name to LxmfConfig table.

routes.description: Route definitions keyed by route_id. Each value is a RouteConfig table. Detailed route policy / retry / channel_room_map validation is done by routing-config.schema.json and the typed RouteConfig dataclass at load time.

RouteEntry.title: RouteEntry
RouteEntry.description: A single route definition, keyed by route_id in the routes mapping. Mirrors RouteConfig from routing-config.schema.json with route_id optional (it is the mapping key). Policy / retry / channel_room_map are modelled as plain objects here; their internal shape is enforced by the component schema and the typed dataclass.

route_id.description: Optional explicit route_id. When omitted, the mapping key is used.

source_adapters.description: Source adapter IDs for this route.

dest_adapters.description: Destination adapter IDs for this route.

enabled.description: Whether this route is enabled at startup.

filter_hooks.description: Reserved — must be empty. Non-empty filter_hooks are rejected at runtime.

source_room.description: Optional source room ID (alias for source_channel).

dest_room.description: Optional destination room ID (alias for dest_channel).

policy.description: Optional static bridge policy. Shape validated by routing-config.schema.json BridgePolicy.

retry.description: Optional per-route retry policy. Shape validated by routing-config.schema.json RouteRetryConfig.

channel_room_map.description: Optional Meshtastic channel → Matrix room mapping. Shape validated by routing-config.schema.json.

source_origin_label.description: Source-side human-readable label for the forward leg of this route.

dest_origin_label.description: Source-side human-readable label for the reverse leg of this route.
